base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of victory_flag — a character from 1992 super mario kart. Checkered victory flag (Lakitu waves at finish). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Checkered victory flag (Lakitu waves at finish)
